channel.title: Smartypants
channel.description: Latest releases from Smartypants on Dropout.tv

item.title: Grocery Stores, Society, Parents
item.description:
Hank organizes grocery stores. Paul improves society. Lorena bets on her parents' attention.

Duration: 33:45

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, lorena russi, paul robalino, hank green
